text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, look! Her legs look so baboom! And her shoulders are on show like dadam! Isn't this outfit super mature?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Wow, mature? Sure. But that's really, well,
adventurous… It's way too soon for Mayano
to be wearing this.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Think I'm gonna buy it!☆ Hehe, everyone's
gonna be shocked by how grown-up I'll look!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
What?! Um… Hey, forget that! Check this out.
It's a midi skirt, and the design's really cute.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Huuuh… But right now, I'd rather look cool
than cute. I'm looking for mature designs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
It's mature-casual, Mayano.
Real adults cover up!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yep… Real adults know when to keep
things hidden… and that's what makes
them the coolest!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I get it! Hiding secrets really does
sound super cool.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, Palmer! Hehe, I'm gonna get
the skirt!♪
